2025 Art Direction • 3D

Architecture
Brio Studio

Translating brutalist architectural vision into a cinematic digital experience.

ClientBrio Architects
Year2025
RoleArt Direction / 3D Visualization / Web Experience
01 / The Brief

Overview

Brio is a Tokyo-based architecture firm operating at the intersection of brutalism and biophilic design. They needed a portfolio experience that communicated the weight and intentionality of their structures — the kind of digital presence that makes you feel the concrete before you see the building. We built a world where architecture breathes.

02 / Context

The
Challenge

Architecture photography is inherently static. The challenge was to convey the experience of being inside a Brio building — the scale, the silence, the way light moves across concrete — through a 2D screen and 5 seconds of first impression.

Their client base includes luxury real estate developers and cultural institutions. The digital experience had to compete not with other architect websites, but with the buildings themselves.

Blender 3D
WebGL
GSAP
03 / Execution

The Solution

We choreographed a gravity-defying scroll experience where buildings emerge like sculptures — rising from darkness, lit by a virtual sun that tracks the user's scroll depth, casting real-time shadows across architectural photography.

01

Scroll Lighting

A virtual directional light source shifts angle based on vertical scroll position — casting shadows that change as if the time of day is advancing through each project.

02

Material Reveals

Project photography is revealed through animated material masks — concrete textures dissolve to expose the image beneath, creating a sense of the building being built before your eyes.

03

Spatial Audio

Ambient audio layers — wind through steel, rain on glass, the hum of urban infrastructure — activate as you enter each project, placing you inside the space.

04 / Results

Performance Metrics

The new Brio Studio digital presence generated 3 new commissions within its first month — directly attributed to the website by two luxury real estate clients.

New Commissions

Attributed directly to the new website

0

Avg Session

Increase in average session duration

Client Inquiries
